ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cashew nut, dry-grilled, no added salt
Cherry, flesh and skin, pitted, raw

ingredients_text: Apricots (15%) (Apricots, Rice Flour, Preservative; (Sulphur Dioxide)), Sweetened Dried Cranberries (15%) (Cranberries, Sugar, Sunflower Oil), Golden Raisins (15%) (Raisins, Sunflower Oil, Preservative: (Sulphur Dioxide)), Seedless Raisins (15%) (Raisins, Palm Oil), Cashew Nuts (10%), Pecan Nuts (10%), Pumpkin Seeds (10%), Sweetened Dried Sour Cherries (5%) (Cherries, Sugar, Sunflower Oil), Sunflower Seeds (5%).
